values: (define-fun fp.isIntegral32 ((x Float32)) Bool (or (fp.isZero x) (and (fp.isNormal x) (= x (fp.roundToIntegral RNE x)))))
(define-fun fp.isIntegral64 ((x Float64)) Bool (or (fp.isZero x) (and (fp.isNormal x) (= x (fp.roundToIntegral RNE x)))))

resultRegexps.pattern: Maximal allocation counts [0-9]+ have been exceeded
